user.title: Connect Webasto/Ampure Unite
user.description: Configure the basic Modbus TCP connection to the wallbox.

connection.name: Connection
connection.description: Basic network and Modbus settings used to reach the charger.

data_description.host: IP address or host name of the charger.
data_description.port: Modbus/TCP port of the charger. Usually 502.
data_description.unit_id: Modbus unit ID used by the charger.
data_description.polling_interval: How often Home Assistant refreshes charger state.

general_charging.name: General Charging
general_charging.description: Base charging behavior, startup mode and current limits.

data_description.installed_phases: Physical charger installation. This also determines whether phase switching is relevant.
data_description.control_mode: On lets the integration actively control charging current and phase switching. Off keeps the integration in read-only monitoring mode with keepalive only.
data_description.startup_charge_mode: Charge mode restored after Home Assistant restart or integration reload.
data_description.user_limit: Normal current limit used in Normal mode.
data_description.safe_current: Fallback current used when the integration cannot safely trust its control inputs.

session_overrides.name: Session Overrides
session_overrides.description: Temporary session-specific charging behavior. These settings do not change the Startup / Default Mode.

data_description.fixed_current: Charging current used when Fixed Current Until Unplug is enabled for a session.
data_description.pv_until_unplug_strategy: Temporary PV strategy used by the PV Until Unplug session override.

dynamic_load_balancing.name: Dynamic Load Balancing
dynamic_load_balancing.description: Limit charging current based on available connection capacity and live house-load sensors.

data_description.dlb_input_model: How Dynamic Load Balancing determines available capacity.
data_description.dlb_sensor_scope: Use Charger Excluded if your house current sensors do not include the charger. Use Charger Included otherwise.
data_description.main_fuse: Main fuse or connection limit the charger should stay below.
data_description.safety_margin: Extra margin kept below the configured main fuse limit.
data_description.dlb_grid_power_sensor: Signed live grid power sensor. Use only as a simple approximation. For 3-phase installations, per-phase current sensors are preferred.

pv_charging.name: PV Charging
pv_charging.description: Use PV surplus for charging and define how strict the integration should be about real surplus.

data_description.pv_control_strategy: Choose whether PV charging should wait for real surplus or allow minimum charging while PV control input remains valid.
data_description.pv_input_model: How PV surplus is provided to the integration.
data_description.pv_surplus_sensor: Sensor that represents currently available PV surplus.
data_description.pv_start_threshold: Minimum surplus required before PV charging may start.
data_description.pv_stop_threshold: Lower surplus boundary below which PV charging may stop again.
data_description.pv_start_delay: How long surplus must stay high enough before PV charging starts.
data_description.pv_stop_delay: How long surplus must stay too low before PV charging stops.
data_description.pv_min_runtime: Minimum time PV charging should keep running after it has started.
data_description.pv_min_pause: Minimum pause before PV charging may start again.
data_description.pv_min_current: Minimum charging current used by Minimum + Surplus.

phase_switching.name: Phase Switching
phase_switching.description: Manual or automatic 1-phase / 3-phase switching for real 3-phase installations. Actual switching behavior still depends on the charger, vehicle and firmware.

data_description.pv_phase_switching_mode: Controls whether 1-phase / 3-phase switching is disabled, manual only, or automatic in PV mode.
data_description.pv_phase_switching_hysteresis: Extra margin around the automatic 1P/3P switching point.
data_description.pv_phase_switching_min_interval: Minimum waiting time before another automatic phase switch is allowed.
data_description.pv_phase_switching_max_per_session: Maximum number of automatic 1P to 3P switch attempts in one plug-in session.

advanced.name: Advanced
advanced.description: Communication and keepalive settings that usually do not need to be changed for normal use.

data_description.keepalive_mode: Controls whether keepalive writes are automatic, always on or disabled.
data_description.keepalive_interval: How often keepalive writes are sent when keepalive is active.
data_description.retries: Number of Modbus retry attempts before a request is treated as failed.

error.min_exceeds_max: Minimum current must be less than or equal to maximum current.
error.user_limit_out_of_range: The default current limit must be between the configured minimum and maximum current.
error.safe_current_out_of_range: The safe current must be between the configured minimum and maximum current.
error.unit_id_out_of_range: Unit ID must be between 1 and 255.
error.dlb_phase_sensor_required: Select the required DLB phase current sensors for the configured 1p or 3p installation.
error.dlb_grid_sensor_required: Select a grid power sensor for the grid-power DLB model.
error.dlb_grid_power_3p_not_supported: Grid-power DLB is only supported for 1-phase charger configurations. Use phase-current sensors for 3-phase DLB.
error.pv_threshold_order: The PV stop threshold must be less than or equal to the PV start threshold.
error.pv_surplus_sensor_required: Select a PV surplus sensor for the surplus-sensor PV model.
error.pv_grid_sensor_required: Select a grid power sensor when PV surplus is derived from grid power.
error.fixed_current_out_of_range: The Fixed Current target must stay within the supported current range.
error.phase_switch_limit_out_of_range: The phase switching session limit must stay within the supported range.
